titleStmt.title: SII 38.228: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 228. (A.R. No. 228 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the Gauḷīśvara shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. This inscription contains two land transactions in continuation. One is dated in the fifth regnal year and the other, sixth regnal year.

It begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, Vīramē tuṇaiy = āgavum etc., It records that the peruṅguṟi mahāsabhās of Sundarachōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and Vānavaṉmādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of Puḷal-nāḍu in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam sold land, after freed from taxes, to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, Paḍampakkanāyakkar, after the receipt of price-money. The members of the sabhas figure as signatories.

The second transaction records that the Peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhā of Siṅgavishṇuchaturvēdimaṅgalam sold four thousand kuḻi of land to an official called Maṇakkuḍaiyār Pasuvadi Tiruvaraṅgadēvaṉ alias Rājēndrachōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, (native) of Maṇakkuḍi in Iḍaiyūr-nāḍu in Vīrarājēndra-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Chōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is mentioned that this land had been lying fallow and the above official bought it, reclaimed and donated to the temple for maintaining a garden called Vīrarājēndradēvartirunandavanam as tirunandavaṉa-paṭṭi.
Among the signatories a merchant of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, Suṟṟi Śaḍaiyaṉ alias Rājādhirājan and others figure as signatories.

The record also mentions the grant of eleven vēli of land by the same official after purchase from the sabhā of Sundarachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam for providing offerings to the stone image of the god (śilāmayana-tirumēni) of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr for conducting rituals and services and also for paying ninety kalam of paddy to the three persons who tended the garden mentioned above (perhaps as wages).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vīrametuṇaiyākavu tiyākameyaṇiyākavum ceṅkolocci karuṅkalikaṭintu kūṭalarcaṅkamattu Āhavamallaṉai Aiñcuvittu vikkalaṉaiyuñciṅkaḷaṉaiyu muṭaipuṟaṅkaṇṭu maṟṟavaṉ māteviyiroṭum vastuvāhaṉamu kaikkoṇṭu Iraṇṭām vicaiyiluṅkuṟitta kaḷattu Āhavamallaṉai Añcuvittu taṉṉuṭan piṟan=tamuṉṉavanu veṅkaināṭumiṭṭu koṇṭu vijayasiṁhāsaṉattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiru
ya kovirājakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīvirarājentradevarkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu [ja]yaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu puḻalnāṭṭu cun=taracoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattum vānavaṉ māteviccaruppetimaṅkalattum peruṅkuṟimahāsabhaiyom nilavilayāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyū(r)ruṭaiya paṭampakka nāyakkarukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur kiḻpiṭākai cekkāṭṭuk kiḻ kaḻaṉiyil śvara tevarkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur kiḻkaḻaṉiyil tarampeṟātu Iva
uvaruñ cavarumāy kiṭan=ta nilam lokamātevi vatikkup pirān=taka vāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcaturattu veli Oṉṟaraiyum Añcām kaṇṇāṟṟu nālām caturattu velioṉṟaraiyum Āṟāmkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcaturattu veli Oṉṟarai tiruvoṟṟiyūr vatikku kiḻakku I[ śvari] kkālukku vaṭakkum nālāmkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal caturattum Iraṇṭāmcaturattum veli Añcāmkaṇṇāṟṟu mutal caturattum Iraṇṭām caturattum veli Oṉṟemukkālum
Innilattukku nittamāyaṭṭi Irukka tiruvoṟṟiūr vatikku kiḻakku Arumoḻitevavāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu munṟāñ caturattu meṟkaṭaiya ccaṅkāṟe kollai nilam veliyum Āka nilampa nāna veliyum Ittevaṟkku cantirātitta varaiyum Iṟaiyiliyāy yiṟukkavum munṟak kaṭavitākavum Innilam Iṟaiyiliyāka kaiyilum ceytu koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Innilattukku Eṅkaḷur Eri ki
koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum viṟṟuk kuṭuttu Emmil Icain=ta vilaipporuḷellām celakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ippiṟamāṇattukku piḻaikkuṟṟameṉṟu collap peṟātārākavum tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya paṭampakkanāyatevarkku Oru kālāvatum Iru kālāvatum mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭutta Innilattukku vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷ māvaṟuti poruṭcelavolaiyum Ituvallatu
ṭṭak kaṭavatallātākavum vilaikkaṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu can=tirātittavaraiyum Innilam Iṟaiyiliyākaviṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom cun=taracoḻacatuṟpetimaṅkalattum vāṉavaṉ māteviccaruppetimaṅkalattum peruṅkuṟima(ā)haāsabhaiyom sabhaiyuḷ Iruntu paṇitta ma ṅka kovin=tapaṭṭar paṇiyālum muppirāṟ kovin=takkirāmavittar paṇiyālum veṟppuṟattu Iḷaiya Utaiyātittakkiramavittar paṇiyālum Ivvūr
ṇineṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu vaṭṭamaṇimātavak kiramavittaṉeḻuttu veṟ(ṟa)ppuṟattu Iḷaiyautaiyātittak kiramavittaneḻuttu muppirāṟkavaṇaiyak kiramavittaneḻuttu vaṭṭamaṇi somadevak kiramavittaṉeḻuttu kumiṇṭilitirunalampak kiramavittaṉeḻuttu kuṭṭu tiruvelikkiramavittaṉeḻuttu vaṭṭamaṇi k kiramavittaṉeḻuttu Iḷaiyak kiramavittaṉeḻuttu Irāyūr [su]riya tevakkiramavittaṉivai
ṉeḻuttu kuṟumaṭimākai cun=taranāṉa ciṅkaḷāntaka pallavarayaṉeḻuttu jentra coḻadevarku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻalkoṭṭattup puḻaṟnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār ciṅkaviṣṇucaruppetimaṅka peruṅkuṟimahāsabhaiyom nilavilayāvaṇak kaieḻuttu coḻamaṇ
ṭalattu virarājentravaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyūrnāṭṭu maṇakkuṭi Atikārikaḷ maṇakkuṭaiyār pacuvati tiruvaraṅkatevaṉārāṉa rājentra coḻa muven=taveḷāṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār paṭampakka nāyaka tevarku ceyta virarājentratevar tirunan=tavanattukku tirunan=tavaṉapaṭṭiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟu Āticaṇṭe
śvaratevarkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur kiḻkaḻaṉiyil taram peṟātu Uvaruñcavarumāyk kiṭan=ta nilattu Ivar tiruttikoḷḷa viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivar tiruttiṉa paṭampakkanāyaka viḷākattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai Innilattukku vaṭakkum mel pārkkellai Ūrārmañciyattukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Ūrmañciyattukku teṟkum Innāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa mikutikuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka śrīpātakkol kuḻi nālāyiramum Ittevarkku can=tirātittavaraiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka cempilum cilālekaiyilum ceytu koḷḷa peṟuvatākavum Innilattukkum paṭampakkanāya
ka viḷākattukkum Eṅkaḷur Ēriyile nirpācci koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum viṟṟuk kuṭuttomayil Iṉta vilaipporuḷolaiyum Āvaṇakkaḷariyil kaiccelakkoṇṭu Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkku Oru kālāvatum Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom ciṅkaviṣṇucaruppetimaṅkalattu peru
ṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom sabhaiyuḷḷiruntu paṇittāṉ ne(ṭ)ṭuveṭpūr can=tirakkiramavittar paṇiyālum Ikkuṭi paṭṭaiyakkiramavittar paṇiyālum Ikkuṭi kā kiramavittar paṇiyālum Ikkuṭi nampisarasark kiramavittar paṇiyālum karumāṇikka kirama(karama)vittar paṇiyālum cempeṭṭu ṇṇiya tiṟuvaṟukki
ramavittar paṇiyālum mutukaṇakku nūṟṟeṇman daṟayampayaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku neṭuveṭppūr can=tirakkiramavittaṉeḻuttu neṭuveṭpūr pākkirakkiramavittaneḻuttu neṭuveṭppūr nampi surasirik kiramavittaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār kāriyañ ceykiṉṟa poṟkoyil piccaneḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ātipuranātapiṭāraṉ (�) Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tiruvoṟṟiyūr viyāpāri cuṟṟicaṭaiyaṉāna rājādhirāja Eḻuttu maṇakkuṭi Uṭaiya vijayarājentravaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyaḷanāṭṭu maṇakkuṭi Atikārikaḷ maṇakkuṭaiyā(ṉ) pacuvati tiruvaraṅkatevaṉā(ā)ṉa rājentramuventaveḷār Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūru
ṭaiya paṭampakkaṉāya tevarkku cun=taracoḻa sabhaiyār pakkal paṭampakka nāyakatevar koyilṉuḷḷāl Eḻun=taruḷiyirukkum cilāmayana tiruneṉi paṭampakkanāyakatevarkku nāḷ Onṟukku tiruvamutukku Arici nānāḻikkum kaṟiamitukkum nellamutu tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutum Uṭpaṭa nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu patakkāka ce
ytaruḷavum nūṟu caṭṭiccoṟu pirasātañ ceytaruḷavum veṇṭuvaṉa vaiyiṟṟukku nellup patiṉkalattukku nilam veliyum piṟṟai nāḷāl śrīmā(ma)yeśvararkku paricaṭṭattukku nilam veliyum tiruvolakattic cevikkum paṭampakkaṉāyakar kuṭṭattuk panniruvarkku kku nila Iruveliyum Aṭuvāku
ḷMay read as aṭuvārkaḷOruvaṉukku nelmuppatiṉ kalattukku nilam veliyum virarācentran tirunan=tavaṉattukkuṭikaḷ muvarkku nel toṇṇūṟṟuk kalattukku vaṭakkaṭaiya nilamiruveliyum Āka nilan patinoru veliyum nivan=tamaṭṭi Arumo
ḻi tevaṉāl Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nellu munnūṟṟu Aṟupatinkalamum Ūr nattam nilam veli
ḻāṉ kunraṉ paṭṭaṉum muppi kkiḻāṉ centaṉ piccaṉum centan Attiyūraṉ kiramavittar Āṭavalānum nantimaṅkalaṅkiḻāṉ nūṟṟuvapatin maṉaṅkāṭiyum Aṅkāṭi nānūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉmaṉum yāṭi ma
va vāma kaṇṇaṉ nānūṟṟaimpati nāḻiyum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum tiru ytittavaraiyum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ kuṭi kiḻāṉ nivun=tañ celuttak kaṭavomākavum jayaciṅkakulakāla peruteru cāliyanakarattom Atikārikaḷ
ṅkaḷum Āticcaṉum ce tāṉum kumaraṉ can=tiraṉum
Digital edition of SII 38.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
